title: cremanthodium nobile var. nobile
intro: Cremanthodium nobile var. nobile, also known as the Tibetan daisy or Himalayan daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Cremanthodium nobile var. nobile include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cold. Cremanthodium nobile var. nobile is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and poultices to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
